resonance_check_box_-2..2^3.M_BAL3_fixed: non-resonant on small box; resonant on {-4..4} via (1,0,0)->(3,0,0)
resonance_check_box_-2..2^3.M3(a) all a=2..50: RESONANT, 4 stable a-INDEPENDENT pairs e.g (0,-2,0)->(0,0,-2) via O(1) companion shear
resonance_check_box_-2..2^3.prescaled M3(a)^2: NON-RESONANT (0 pairs) - squaring absorbs the O(1) shear channel

verdict: M3(a)/M4 accelerating families REPRODUCE the c=0 resonance (a-independent O(1) shear channel); only PRESCALED/squared maps are non-resonant and give min|B_J| bounded-below & non-shrinking at J<=3 on a SMALL box. Not a uniform-floor proof: only shallow depth, favorable small-box proxy, prescale (not acceleration) does the work, and metric-separation is orthogonal to the real arc-incidence barrier.
